text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Tulip Sho, a preliminary race for the Classics,
is fast approaching.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, two Umamusume run into each other at
an intersection.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Vodka?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh, Scarlet. It's you. Hey.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hmph. I guess you're coming to my Tiara tour too.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You're going to run in the Tulip Sho, aren't you? I
just finished registering.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hah! You wanted to pick a fight. All I did was
take you up on it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are two major paths through the Classics:
the Triple Crown and the Tiara.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their preliminary races aren't completely
separate, but the Tulip Sho typically leads to the
Tiara tour.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Geez... All you had to do is sit back and watch, but you had to jump on in.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You really are a dummy. If you're going to get in
my way, just know I won't show you any mercy.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You're one to talk! You're like a small dog, all yip
and no bite.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
At the very least, you could learn how to bark like
you mean it.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What did you just say?! I hope you enjoy the taste
of defeat when I make you eat those words!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'll brush you off like you're nothing with my
transcendent pacing ability!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! Think ya can scare me with fancy words
like "transcendent pacing?"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two only bumped into each other by chance,
but for some reason, they keep on walking
together.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hate to break it to ya, but that's no match for my
edge. Some people call me the "Jackknife."

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. Don't underestimate the pace of the
Classics. If you don't have enough stamina,
everyone's just going to trample over you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: They start off arguing about racing, but...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You never even clean the room! Your stuff is
always all over the place!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Well, what the heck's up with your new pajamas?!
Those red squiggles aren't flowers—it's a field of
brains, I tell ya!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They end up just insulting each other... As
roommates, there must be a lot of tension built
up between them.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Whatever. On the day of the race, I'll show you
that I'm better than you at everything!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
There's no rhyme or reason to the way you run!
You're just the number one most annoying
opponent that I'm going to beat!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You just keep dreamin' for now, but you're in for
a rude awakenin'!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
This tired back and forth is just too lame. Let's
decide things properly, on the racetrack!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: You can't take it back now! I'll see you there!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You better come to the Hanshin Racecourse
prepared!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet walks away without a second
glance, the wind at her back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though they have different goals, it may be
their fate as contemporaries to butt heads.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
S-sorry, Trainer. We were fightin' like little kids
back there.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: C-close?! No way! She's nothin' to me!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But havin' her flappin' and flutterin' around in the
background all the time is a pain.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
So let's deal with her real quick before heading to
the Derby. It looks like she's up for it too!
